rulings.Case Title: HANS J REINHARDT VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBRITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 1. RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBRITRATION's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. Deny. Petition failed to name indispensable party, the landlord and or successor landlord. And Statute of Limitations has run. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN JENKEL, A SAN FRANCISCO PROPERTY OWNER VS. LS CAPITAL GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Request For Extraordinary Relief From Domestic Terrorism
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 2. Petitioner's Request For Extraordinary Relief From Domestic Terrorism. Deny. Writ improper under CCP 1102 which addresses judicial proceedings. Alternatively if viewed as request for Preliminary Injunction, fails to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN BERMAN VS. LESLIE BAHR et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT 8-10 CARMEL STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege standing. Rights delegated per CCR 7.10 are only for use and enjoyment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFFs CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, MAXIMILIANO VALLE, MARIA VALLE, and TERESA VALLE's Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order. Grant. See 10/25/12 order page 2 lines 4-6. Defendant shall comply no later than 12/21/12. Plus sanctions in the amount of $2500 and costs of $60. Payable within 10 days. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE DEVELOPMENT COMMERCIAL LLC, VS. YOSHI'S SAN FRANCISCO, LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 6. PLAINTIFF FILLMORE DEVELOPMENT COMMERCIAL LLC's, Motion For Appointment Of Receiver. Off Calendar. Bankruptcy filed 11/28/12. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Full Complete Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT TANYA PHILLIPS' (Amended) Motion To Compel Full Complete Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff. Grant motion. Responses to be provided by 12/21/12. Sanctions in the amount of $2850. Opposition untimely and stricken CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL OFFENBACHER VS. TAYYAB SIDDIQUI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Furtehr Responses For Sanctions, And For Permitting Late Completion Of Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT TAYYAB SIDDIQUI's Motion To Compel Further Responses For Sanctions, And For Permitting Late Completion Of Discovery. Off Calendar - case settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. OZLEM KUS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 17, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT OZLEM KUS' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition, plus posting $2985. = (501/REQ)
